Hi, what's up, gym lords? A lot of you guys asked me how we did our supplement launch and how we kind of sold a lot and so I outlined all the steps for you guys and here we go. So number one, if you're watching this and you didn't watch all of Alex's training, that's so you go watch all that because that's the stuff I watched and just copied it. Like I listened very, very carefully. The thing that Alex said probably six times in his training is that the team has to be bought in, there has to be a tremendous amount of conviction from the team. So that's what I really focused on, that's what I think we did pretty well and that's why it went kind of smooth. Alright, so step one that we did, we built type in the Facebook group probably 60 days out. I don't think it takes that much time but that's just what we did. I'm just going to give you what we exactly did and what worked for us. I posted photos of like me at the summit with Alex and Layla and then call to action stuff like explain a little bit about proceeds labs and then how it's going to work and then who's excited or who would be interested and just get a lot of called action and all those little micro commitments. Alright. Second thing is I took everything myself. So I think I've heard from a couple people like they're trying to sell them but they don't even take them themselves. Like I took them, right? Like I did them for about 60 days and like felt amazing. So like my conviction in selling them was very, very simple because I feel amazing. Like it's a phenomenal product but just make sure that you're taking them, that'd be my advice. And then get the team hyped up. So I did the science trainings with the team. I explained to them who Dr. Cashew was talking about Alex went through the breaking belief stuff with them at team trainings for a few weeks. And then we launched a 21 day coaches challenge and honestly this is probably the most impactful thing that we did. So if all things talk about I think this is going to be the number one most important thing. So the 21 day challenge. So I bought all my coaches as nine of them, Ultimates. We opted to not do burn PM and last minute cleanse but everything else. So just FYI we have a women's only gym, a women's only team and they all took Testorm and they all loved it. So if you're on the fence about that Testorm is great for women. So I bought them Ultimates. What I did was I said listen it's $400. I explained to them how the wholesale work. I said so roughly 50% is the wholesale. I said I'm going to cover half. You guys are going to cover half. And I said the reason I'm doing this is because I know that when things are free free you don't buy them as much. So I'm going to ask you guys for you know $99 for an ultimate pad that costs $400. Is that cool? They all said fine. It was more than fair. Especially after they were excited about how good the products were. Then I said $150 cash prize for the best transformation. So the coaches requirements were they had to do before and after photos. They had to do four of our kickboxing workouts per week plus the rest they wanted. They had to do the meal plan that is designed to go with the supplements for 21 days and whoever has the best point after wins money. We had so many good before and afters that actually gave away to first place prices. Cool cool cool. Oh and also I made a private Facebook group for daily posts. So literally every coach had to post every morning what their meals were. Did they take the supplements which is obviously it was a yes. How they're feeling on like a one to ten energy level. What their sleep was like and what their workout plan for the day is. So there was a ton of accountability the team pushed each other to do and honestly other than making you know good profit this was the best thing we did like team building wise and like culture building wise. Like it's it's been not night and day really good culture but like a gigantic leap in causativity momentum you know results confidence from all the coaches like it was the best thing we did as a company in the last two years easily. All right cool. What happened was about midway through the client started seeing that the girls were getting in phenomenal shape and so the girls are already in good shape and then I noticed that they're getting even better shape and so the buzz started up what are you guys doing. They mentioned it you know and then the client got a cut. All right cool and then we did hype for the biggest announcement of our gyms history. So for about 10 days every class on Facebook everything were like hey guys biggest announcement ever is happening Wednesday at 8 p.m. biggest announcement ever life changing game changing like we just built it up built it up built it up built it up. When I went live we had about 120 plus people live on the video which you guys know is a lot because basically everybody tuned in because we made such a big deal out of this big announcement. We took the challenge we explained to them that people off the street pay 600 bucks for the challenge this is what they get and then we added a bunch of enhancers so we added a done for you meal prep course of like we took the meal plan and then you know made a grocery list specific with recipes and all our coaches did that like literally be like listen it's 42 bucks you can make 21 meals that was like an add-on thing. Cool so that is all the hype that's all the build up now the actual sales part of it. So I did a Malt one-on-one I used the the PowerPoint that Dallas put together and I modified it I included our coaches before and after photos to me this is the biggest selling point so you're not just saying this works for people you're saying this works for our people. Our coaches the nine of them they lost 62 inches and 52 pounds as a team in 21 days so those actual results were pretty much the biggest selling point that I think the conviction was at.
